data.title: Pavilion Payments acquires CasinoSoft to innovate gaming payments and compliance in the industry.
data.description: Pavilion Payments has made a significant move in the gaming industry by acquiring CasinoSoft to enhance gaming payments and compliance. This acquisition aims to revolutionize the sector by combining the expertise of Pavilion Payments, the top omnichannel payment solutions provider, with CasinoSoft's specialized offerings. The updated headline emphasizes Pavilion Payments' acquisition of CasinoSoft, emphasizing their commitment to transforming gaming payments and compliance. This strategic partnership signifies a shift in the gaming sector, with Pavilion Payments at the forefront of innovation.

data.title: Explora Journeys to return to Monaco for Formula 1 Grand Prix de Monaco 2026 after successful debut in 2025.
data.description: In 2025, Explora Journeys made a significant impact with its debut, transforming the experience of ocean travel and luxury motorsport. The brand continues to push boundaries in Monte Carlo, enhancing the luxury lifestyle sector. The debut in 2025 was marked by exceptional success, showcasing the brand's commitment to innovation and excellence.

data.title: Strategy's $72B Bitcoin is held by various custodians, including Coinbase; Fidelity may have 70,000 BTC.
data.description: The $72 billion Bitcoin holdings of Strategy are divided among various undisclosed custodians, with Coinbase being the only one confirmed. Fidelity is believed to potentially possess 70,000 BTC.

data.title: Wendy Luk launches an 8-week program for spiritually minded professionals in Vancouver on July 18, 2025.
data.description: A transformative program spanning eight weeks has been devised to provide spiritual purpose coaching, incorporating quantum healing, intuitive counseling, and soul activations. Tailored for Lightworkers, Starseeds, and mission-focused individuals seeking alignment with their Divine journey, this initiative is set to commence in Vancouver, BC. Scheduled to start on July 18, 2025, the program promises to empower participants through a mix of spiritual practices and holistic guidance, helping them tap into their true potential.

data.title: BSA/AIA, AIANY and AIA|LA released a report on affordable housing, part of a webinar series with BSA/AIA. Event on July 17, 2025.
data.description: A webinar titled "Penciling Out: Financing Solutions for Affordable & Climate Forward Housing" is set to be part of a series on July 17, 2025. Hosted by the Boston Society for Architecture (BSA/AIA), American Institute of Architects New York (AIANY), and AIA Los Angeles (AIA|LA), the event aims to discuss funding options for environmentally-friendly and affordable housing. The collaboration between the three organizations signals a united effort to address the pressing need for sustainable housing solutions. The webinar is expected to attract a large audience interested in innovative financing strategies in the housing sector.

data.title: Monster Energy's UNLEASHED Podcast features BMX athletes Jamie Bestwick and Andy Buckworth at X Games Salt Lake City 2025 in a special live episode. Episode 505 recorded live with Monster Energy showcasing BMX icons.
data.description: In the recent broadcast of Episode 505 of a podcast covering sports and pop culture, the show was recorded live at the X Games Salt Lake City 2025. Taking place in Salt Lake City on July 18, 2025, the event featured special coverage from UNLEASHED and was sponsored by Monster Energy. The episode highlighted two renowned BMX personalities and marked the inaugural X Games event in the city.
